## Fact-check notes
- Google DeepMind launched Gemma 4 on April 3, 2026, as its most capable open model family, optimized for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows under Apache 2.0 license (Source: LinkedIn AI Updates March 31 - April 7, 2026 by Dhanushkumar R)
- Gemma 4 is built on Gemini technology with high intelligence-per-parameter and on-device capability, including a 26B-A4B variant (Source: llm-stats.com model tracker, April 2026)
